candidate_summary: Stratigraphic LLM retrieval: corpus organized in deposition-style layers; each stratum's relevance cascades to next.

results.title: LLM-guided Hierarchical Retrieval (LATTICE)
results.rationale: Directly describes hierarchical retrieval with path-aggregated relevance; named LATTICE paper which is candidate's prior-art anchor.

results.title: LATTICE openreview
results.rationale: Same LATTICE paper, alternate venue; matches multiple core terms.

results.title: Knowledge Graph RAG for LLM-based Recommendation
results.rationale: KG-RAG with hierarchical knowledge structure; meets kw>=2 threshold via RAG and hierarchical retrieval phrasing.

results.title: RAG for LLMs: A Survey
results.rationale: Generic RAG survey; no hierarchical/stratigraphic specifics. Only one kw match.

results.title: Knowledge graphs + LLMs fusion
results.rationale: KG-LLM fusion; no explicit hierarchical retrieval or stratigraphic cascade content.

results.title: Iterative LLM-Based Approach
results.rationale: Iterative refinement is adjacent but not hierarchical/stratigraphic; no kw match.

results.title: Synergizing RAG and Reasoning: Systematic Review
results.rationale: Multi-step retrieval review; only RAG term matches; not hierarchical/stratigraphic.

results.title: LLM Research Papers 2025
results.rationale: Review listing mentions hierarchical retrieval among many topics; single kw match insufficient.

results.title: Pollen identification through CNN
results.rationale: Source-domain pollen identification; no stratigraphic succession or LLM retrieval content; 'pollen' alone is not in the content-word list (only 'pollen succession').
